dreams.title: Cyber Ninja: Tokyo Rebellion
dreams.description: In futuristic Tokyo, a cyber-enhanced ninja fights against a corrupt megacorporation. Complete missions, upgrade cyber abilities, defeat robotic enemies, and uncover a conspiracy threatening humanity.

blueprint.title: Cyber Ninja: Tokyo Rebellion

stories.mission: Mission: Dodge traffic and complete 3 lap circuits. Defeat the fearsome Apex Predator Mk.3!
stories.ending: Apex Predator Mk.3 falls. Moto Racer has conquered Tokyo!

dreams.title: Snake & Ladder: Kingdom Quest
dreams.description: Travel across a magical kingdom by rolling dice and moving across a 100-tile board. Instead of ordinary snakes and ladders, players encounter dragons, secret portals, magical stairways, treasure rooms, traps, and powerful bosses.

blueprint.title: Snake & Ladder: Kingdom Quest

dreams.title: Shadow Run: Hyderabad Escape
dreams.description: A young hacker steals secret data from a powerful AI syndicate and must escape through the streets of Hyderabad. Run across metro rooftops, dodge traffic, avoid drones, collect data chips, and survive relentless pursuit.
